live_mode.description: This field will be true if this object exists in the live environment or false if it exists in the test environment.

resource_type.description: One of payment_order, expected_payment, or ledger_transaction.

status.description: One of pending, processing, or completed.

total_resource_count.description: Total number of items in the `resources` array. Once a bulk request is completed, `success_result_count` + `failed_result_count` will be equal to `total_result_count`.

success_result_count.description: Total number of successful bulk results so far for this request

failed_result_count.description: Total number of failed bulk results so far for this request

metadata.description: Additional data represented as key-value pairs. Both the key and value must be strings.
